title: Department Manager Vacancy at FitOn Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at FitOn Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FitOn Holdings Services! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FitOn Holdings Services:
FitOn Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FitOn Holdings Services!
